dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, opportunity doesn't knock twice. The old leader of {location} is gone, and every schemer in the settlement is circling the empty chair.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I've spent years building connections, stockpiling favors, and waiting for exactly this moment. But my rivals are moving fast. {target_npc} has already started promising people things they can't deliver. I need {quest_item} from {location_hint} to secure the allegiance of the craftworkers' guild before {target_npc} gets to them. The {enemy_type} threat on our borders makes this urgent: whoever takes control needs to be ready to defend us, not just give speeches.
dialogueChunks.outro: Help me claim what's mine, and you'll have the ear of the most powerful person in the region.

playerResponses.text: A strong leader beats a popular one. I'll get what you need.
Power plays are messy business. What's my cut?
I don't get involved in succession fights. Too many knives.

dialogueChunks.intro: Keep your voice down, {player_name}. What I'm offering could make us both very wealthy, or very dead.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A prospector found a vein of rare ore {location_hint} last week and made the mistake of telling me before anyone else. If I can secure {quest_item} to stake a legal claim before the guild merchants get wind of it, I'll control the only supply in three regions. {target_npc} has been sniffing around, asking questions about the prospector's route. If they beat me to the claim, everything I've built in {location} becomes worthless. The {enemy_type} have been spotted near the vein, which is the only reason nobody else has moved on it yet.
dialogueChunks.outro: Fortune favors the bold, not the cautious. Are you bold enough?

playerResponses.text: Bold and well-compensated. Show me the way.
Cornering a market is ruthless. I like it. I'm in.
Monopolies create enemies. I'd rather not be one of them.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I don't need a hero. I need someone practical who understands that winning isn't always clean.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The current leader of {location} is corrupt, but everyone loves them because they smile well and give pretty speeches. {target_npc} has proof of their misdeeds hidden {location_hint}, but getting to it means dealing with the {enemy_type} that have overrun the old record hall. I need {quest_item} from those archives to expose the truth before the harvest feast, when the leader plans to announce a new tax that will bleed us all dry.
dialogueChunks.outro: This isn't about ambition. It's about replacing someone unworthy with someone who isn't afraid to make hard choices. Namely, me.

playerResponses.text: Exposing corruption is worth the risk. I'll retrieve the evidence.
Dirty politics with a side of monster-fighting. What's the pay?
One schemer replacing another isn't progress. Pass.
